rule.statement: Decision MUST score all 6 Boehm + Turner dimensions; partial scoring is rejected.

rationale.source: Boehm + Turner — Balancing Agility and Discipline

rule.rationale: Partial scoring biases recommendation toward the dominant rater.

rule.statement: Each dimension score MUST cite evidence (artefact, metric, observation); ungrounded scores rejected.
rule.rationale: Subjective scoring drifts to comfort zone of rater.

rule.statement: When hybrid is recommended, the record MUST name the tilt (e.g., 'predictive on regulatory milestones; agile on UX iteration') with boundaries.
rule.rationale: Unnamed hybrid degrades into best-of-both-worlds prose.

rule.statement: Decision MUST list at least 2 re-evaluation triggers (e.g., velocity volatility > 30%, escalation rate > 1/sprint).
rule.rationale: Modes drift; explicit triggers force re-evaluation.

rule.statement: Decision MUST be committed to version control with date + sponsor signature; verbal decisions rejected.
rule.rationale: Mode decisions taken verbally are re-litigated.
